jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Baidyanath - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Baidyanath has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Baidyanath:
Baidyanath is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baidyanath!
